underlying_goal: Add a Claude instruction rule about asking for permission instead of silently ignoring when denied in don't-ask mode, then commit and push changes
friction_detail: Claude couldn't edit .claude files due to permission issues and failed to resolve the protected path limitation, requiring user to grant permissions manually.
brief_summary: User wanted to add a Claude instruction about permission handling in don't-ask mode and push changes; achieved after permission friction but the edit and push succeeded.
